title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
author: John Ford (Film)
content: “When the legend becomes fact, print the legend.”

title: Lonesome Dove
author: Larry McMurtry
content: “It ain't dying I'm talking about, it's living. I mean, where's the life in what we've been doing?”
action: Evaluate the substance of your daily work.

title: True Grit
author: Charles Portis
content: “You must pay for everything in this world one way and another. There is nothing free except the Grace of God.”
action: Acknowledge the cost of every decision.

title: The Outlaw Josey Wales
author: Clint Eastwood (Film)
content: “Dying ain't much of a living, boy.”

title: Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid
author: William Goldman (Film)
content: “I'm not crazy. I'm just ahead of my time.”
